attacking_style: Launches decisive long-range attacks on penultimate climbs with significant distance remaining (65km to go), relying on descending prowess at high speeds (90kph) to establish and maintain gaps.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Excels on multi-climb stages where descending skills can be weaponized after attacking on earlier climbs; technical descents at high speed favor him decisively over chasers.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify repeated vulnerability patterns, though historical health problems mentioned suggest potential durability concerns.
key_patterns: Attacks from large breakaway groups rather than peloton, selecting moments on climbs before finale.
Uses exceptional descending speed (90kph) as primary gap-building weapon after initial attack.
Capable of sustaining solo efforts over extremely long distances (65km) after initial selection.
form_trajectory: positive: First stage win in years following health problems suggests resurgent form and confidence in 2022
